title: group config blocks + unified cascade + transition:{}/graph:{}
manager: Configuration blocks attached to a group — styling, transition defaults (`transition:{}`), graph-level settings (`graph:{}`) — that cascade to members through one unified rule, so you set a property on the group and every member inherits it with a defined precedence. This is what makes groups a real styling and behavior layer rather than just a naming convenience, and it descends from the long #114 config-block lineage.
cs: per-group config blocks; unified cascade (theme < state:{} < kind < group-by-depth < state) with transition:{}/graph:{} sub-blocks; #114 lineage.
